summary: Minor UI tweaks and internal improvements
changes: Various visual refinements
Internal component updates
Explorer now supports URL parameters

summary: Changelog modal accessible from sidebar version number
changes: Clickable version in sidebar opens changelog modal
Versions grouped by major.minor (patch entries merged)
Version data sourced from changelog.json
Responsive design for all pages (dashboard, map, explorer, distribution, bubble, lore, miladies)
Tap-to-flip on mobile for Miladies cards
Volumes now computed from DB instead of Magic Eden API (accurate, no 100-trade limit)
ME sales sync and floor price snapshot added to daily cron
Faster ME API timeout (3s) with API-down notice on dashboard
Web3 providers lazy-loaded only on portfolio page (faster compilation)
Git version displayed correctly on Vercel builds
Routes renamed: /metadatas → /explorer, /mibebubble → /bubble, /eden → /dashboard
Side menu reorganized: Overview / Collection / Analytics sections
Grails and Miladies pages redesigned with card flip mechanic
Explorer: 9-column fracture reveal with progressive flip animation
Treemap labels with truncation, breadcrumb titles, responsive layouts
Timeline made full width, Era Distribution pie chart removed

summary: Initial release — MibeStats live on Vercel
changes: Dashboard with floor price, volumes, sales stats, and charts
Explorer with metadata grid and sales history per token
Distribution page with pie charts, bar charts, and treemaps
Map with 10,000 Mibera birth locations colored by trait
Bubble map with wallet relationship graph
Lore page with fracture timeline and FBI fugitives
Sales history with filterable table and price chart
On-chain sales sync via GitHub Actions cron
Security hardening: CSP, rate limiting, parameterized queries
